title: Sentry Self Storage Weekly Dashboard — Data Payload
description: Full data payload injected by the n8n workflow each Monday. Claude API parses the Storable Edge PDFs and returns this structure. The workflow performs a string-replace of '// %%INJECT_DATA%%' in template.html with const declarations for every top-level property.

META.description: Report metadata — dates, period labels, and snapshot counts used to populate all dynamic text in the dashboard.

weekEnding.description: Full date of the current snapshot used throughout headings. Example: 'May 3, 2026'

weekEndingShort.description: Same date without comma, used in the page <title>. Example: 'May 3 2026'

periodLabel.description: The MTD date range for the current week. Example: 'May 1-3, 2026'

mtdMonth.description: Month abbreviation used in the 'Move-Ins MTD' chart label. Example: 'May'

prevWeekLabel.description: Short label for the prior snapshot date used in WoW comparisons. Example: 'Apr 27'

snapshotCount.description: Total number of snapshots in HDATES (and all PORT_* arrays). Example: 17

propertyCount.description: Number of properties in the portfolio. Example: 26

yearStartLabel.description: Short label for the first snapshot of the year, used as baseline. Example: 'Jan 5'

gapFillLabel.description: Label for the gap-fill anchor snapshot, shown in the AR KPI row. Null if no gap fill was needed. Example: 'Feb 9, 2026'

arTrackStart.description: First date shown in the AR trend section header. Example: 'Jan 12'

midAnchorIndex.description: Zero-based index into HDATES for the STORES_MID anchor snapshot. Per-store chart history is pinned to this index. Example: 4 (for Feb 9 when HDATES[4] == '2/9')

HDATES.description: Ordered list of snapshot date labels. Must be the same length as PORT_SQ, PORT_DP, PORT_TOTAL_AR, PORT_AR91, and PORT_ARPC. Example: ["1/12","1/19","1/26",...]

PORT_SQ.description: Portfolio average sq.ft occupancy % for each snapshot in HDATES order.

PORT_DP.description: Portfolio average $/sq.ft (monthly) for each snapshot in HDATES order. PORT_ANN is derived from this array in the template (value * 12).

PORT_TOTAL_AR.description: Portfolio total AR $ for each snapshot in HDATES order.

PORT_AR91.description: Portfolio 91+ day AR $ for each snapshot in HDATES order.

PORT_ARPC.description: Portfolio AR as % of rent roll for each snapshot in HDATES order.

PORT.description: Portfolio aggregate KPIs for the current week.

sqftOcc.description: Portfolio average sq.ft occupancy % as of the current snapshot.

econOcc.description: Portfolio average economic occupancy % as of the current snapshot.

moveIns.description: Total move-ins across all stores, MTD.

moveOuts.description: Total move-outs across all stores, MTD.

net.description: Net rentals (moveIns minus moveOuts), MTD. May be negative.

leadsOpened.description: Total leads opened across all stores in the current period.

unrent.description: Current total unrentable units across all stores.

unrentPrev.description: Prior week's total unrentable units (WoW comparison).

avgDpsf.description: Portfolio average $/sq.ft (monthly) as of the current snapshot.

topMoveInSource.description: The lead source that generated the most move-ins this period. Example: 'Walk-In'

topMoveInCount.description: Number of move-ins attributed to topMoveInSource.

PORT_LEADS.description: Leads opened by source across the entire portfolio for the current period. Keys are source names; values are lead counts. Example: {"Call Center (XPS)": 15, "Walk-In": 12}

STORES_YEAR_START.description: Per-store sq.ft occupancy, $/sq.ft, and annualized rate at the year-start snapshot (META.yearStartLabel). Used as the baseline for delta calculations and as the first anchor point in per-store trend charts. Keys are canonical store names matching STORES.

STORES_MID.description: Per-store sq.ft occupancy, $/sq.ft, and annualized rate at the mid-year anchor snapshot (HDATES[META.midAnchorIndex]). Used as the second anchor point in per-store trend charts; typically the gap-fill date. Keys must match STORES.

STORES_PREV_UR.description: Per-store unrentable unit count as of the prior snapshot (META.prevWeekLabel). Used for WoW unrentable comparisons in store tiles. Keys must match STORES.

STORES.description: Current-week store data keyed by canonical store name. Each value is a StoreRecord with all KPIs for the current snapshot period.

additionalProperties.description: StoreRecord — all KPIs for one store as of the current week.

sqftOcc.description: Sq.ft occupancy % — occupied sq.ft / total rentable sq.ft * 100.

unitOcc.description: Unit occupancy % — occupied units / total units * 100.

econOcc.description: Economic occupancy % — actual rent / asking rent * 100. May exceed 100 if above-rate units are occupied.

rent.description: Gross rent collected $ (MTD or as of snapshot).

totalSqFt.description: Total rentable sq.ft for this property.

occSqFt.description: Occupied sq.ft as of the snapshot.

dpsf.description: Average revenue per occupied sq.ft per month ($).

unrent.description: Number of unrentable units as of the snapshot.

netRentals.description: Net rentals MTD (moveIns minus moveOuts). May be negative.

occupiedUnits.description: Occupied unit count as of snapshot.

arPct.description: Accounts receivable as % of rent roll. Goal is 3% or less.

leads.description: Total leads received in the current period (all channels).

leadsOpened.description: Leads that were opened / converted to a tour or inquiry.

leadSources.description: Optional breakdown of leads opened by source channel. Omit or set to {} if no leads. Example: {"Walk-In": 2, "Call Center (XPS)": 1}

closingRatio.description: Closing ratio % (moveIns / leads * 100). Null when leads = 0.
